title: Schema validator + Hugging Face model-card metadata emitter
context: Without a schema validator and a Hugging Face model-card emitter, every per-model card task requires manual format checking and risks producing non-conformant output. The validator ensures every card is complete and schema-valid before review; the HF emitter converts the canonical JSON to the YAML front-matter required by Hugging Face model cards. Both are CI-gated with golden fixtures. Depends on schema-001.
objective: Build and ship a TypeScript schema validator for the canonical model-card schema and a Hugging Face model-card YAML/Markdown metadata emitter, both tested with golden fixtures in CI.
acceptanceCriteria: Schema validator accepts valid canonical model-card objects and rejects malformed ones; golden valid-card fixtures pass and golden invalid-card fixtures fail in CI.

Hugging Face model-card YAML front-matter emitter converts canonical model-card JSON to valid HF model-card YAML; output is validated against the pinned HF model-card metadata spec; golden canonical-to-HF output fixtures are diffed in CI.
specVersions block in the emitter output records the pinned HF model-card spec version.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; no credentials or patient data in any committed file.
resources: PLAN.md — Tech stack, Solution approach, Test fixtures & golden files
Hugging Face model-card metadata spec (current modelcard schema)
output: A merged PR adding a TypeScript schema validator and HF model-card YAML emitter with golden fixtures and CI integration.
